hold_reason: No new 3_STAR draw has been ingested since P99/P100 history_end_draw=115000024. Current DB max 3_STAR draw=115000024 equals history_end. P101 cannot proceed to evaluation until actual_draw_available=true.
p101_gate_reason: P101 requires actual_draw_available=true. Current actual_draw_available=false. Monitor again after new 3_STAR draw is ingested into DB (draw > 115000024).
recommended_next_action: Wait for controlled 3_STAR draw ingestion or authorized source decision. After new draw is ingested (draw > 115000024), re-run P100 script (scripts/special3_prospective_evaluation.py) to produce EVALUATED artifact. P101 proceeds only after P100 classification = P100_SPECIAL3_PROSPECTIVE_EVALUATION_READY.
trigger_condition: actual 3_STAR draw with draw > 115000024 present in DB
p102_gate_reason: P102 blocked until P101 is READY_FOR_EVALUATION and P100 is EVALUATED
sop_checklist: STEP 1: Confirm new 3_STAR draw source is authorized
STEP 2: Ingest draw into DB under controlled procedure
STEP 3: Verify draw > 115000024 in DB: SELECT MAX(CAST(draw AS INTEGER)) FROM draws WHERE lottery_type='3_STAR'
STEP 6: Re-run this monitor: verify classification upgrades to P101_SPECIAL3_ACTUAL_DRAW_MONITOR_READY_FOR_EVALUATION
STEP 7: Run full test suite — all tests must pass
STEP 8: Commit artifacts and open PR for P101 EVALUATED path
